title: [CI:DOCS] labeler: Use `machine` label
body:
Consensus was against area/ in
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/21146

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Before merging this someone with privileges just needs to click on the "labels" section and edit the area/machine label to just "machine"

renamed the label and given the blessing you've already got on the issue:

/lgtm
